product.title: Product
product.description: Leave management and availability publishing for Xero Payroll teams.

meta.title: Leave management and availability for Xero teams
meta.description: LeaveSync connects to Xero Payroll, syncs approved leave, and publishes secure ICS calendar feeds for Outlook, Google Calendar, and Apple Calendar.

hero.announcement: Now supporting Xero Payroll AU, NZ, and UK

cases.title: Built for teams using Xero Payroll

features.title: Everything your team needs to manage leave
features.description: From submission to ICS feed delivery, LeaveSync handles the full availability lifecycle alongside Xero Payroll.

items.title: Xero Payroll integration
items.description: Connect to Xero Payroll AU, NZ, or UK via OAuth. Approved leave syncs automatically. Leave submissions write back to Xero synchronously.

items.title: Leave submission and approval
items.description: Employees submit leave inside LeaveSync. Managers approve or decline. Every decision writes back to Xero without manual entry.

items.title: Manual availability
items.description: Record WFH, travelling, training, and client-site entries alongside leave. Everything is visible in one canonical availability model.

items.title: ICS calendar feeds
items.description: Publish per-person ICS feeds with a secure token. Compatible with Outlook, Google Calendar, and Apple Calendar. Privacy controls govern what is visible.

stats.title: Real availability data, reliably delivered
stats.description: LeaveSync keeps Xero and your team's calendars in sync. No manual entry, no stale data, no reconciliation overhead.

testimonials.title: Trusted by teams running Xero Payroll

items.title: No more spreadsheets
items.description: We used to maintain a shared spreadsheet to track who was off. LeaveSync replaced it entirely, and our calendar feeds are always accurate.

items.title: Xero sync is seamless
items.description: The approval flow inside LeaveSync writes straight to Xero. Our payroll team no longer has to reconcile anything manually.

items.title: ICS feeds changed everything
items.description: Every manager now subscribes to their team's feed. Leave and WFH entries appear in Google Calendar automatically.

items.title: Privacy controls are thoughtful
items.description: We can control exactly what appears on published feeds. Sensitive leave categories stay private; general availability is visible to the team.

faq.title: Common questions about LeaveSync
faq.description: Everything you need to know before connecting your Xero Payroll account.

items.question: Which Xero Payroll regions does LeaveSync support?
items.answer: LeaveSync supports Xero Payroll Australia, New Zealand, and United Kingdom. Each region's leave types and payroll structures are handled correctly.

items.question: How does the Xero connection work?
items.answer: You authorise LeaveSync via Xero's standard OAuth flow. LeaveSync reads employee and leave data, and writes approved leave submissions back to Xero.

items.question: What is an ICS feed?
items.answer: An ICS feed is a calendar subscription URL. Outlook, Google Calendar, and Apple Calendar can all subscribe to it. When leave is approved or updated in LeaveSync, the feed refreshes automatically.

items.question: Can I control what appears on the ICS feed?
items.answer: Yes. Privacy controls let you configure which leave categories and availability types are visible on published feeds. Sensitive categories can be hidden or shown as unavailable without detail.

items.question: What is a manual availability entry?
items.answer: Beyond leave, employees can record WFH, travelling, training, or client-site entries. These appear on ICS feeds alongside approved leave so managers see the full picture.

cta.title: Connect your Xero Payroll account
cta.description: LeaveSync works with your existing Xero Payroll setup. No migration required. Connect your account, sync your team, and start publishing calendar feeds.
